calendarEventDraft.summary: James Reynolds - YouTube Strategist - Global Interview
calendarEventDraft.description:
Interview scheduled by the Slack scheduling assistant.
Zoom: zoom.lonl

reminderEmail.subject: Let's Connect About Your Application!
reminderEmail.body:
Hi James,

Thank you so much for applying for the YouTube Strategist - Global role at Outsourced Pro Global! We're excited to learn more about you and share what makes our team a great place to grow.

We'd love to invite you for a quick 15-20 minute Zoom chat with our Recruitment Specialist. This is a great chance for us to get to know each other better and see if this role and our company are the right fit for you.

Interview details:
Date: 2026-05-22
Time: 09:00
Zoom Link: zoom.lonl

Friendly Reminders:

  • Kindly connect 10 minutes early to make sure your camera and microphone are working properly.
  • Use your laptop or PC for this interview.
  • Make sure that your Full Name and the role you are interviewing for are reflected in the Zoom meeting.
  • Please be reminded that this is a formal meeting, so be in business attire.
  • If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to any of our recruiters at +61 489 275 966 (AU) or through their mobile number.

Yours in Outsourced Pro Global,


--

Best Regards,

Outsourced Pro Global Limited

Recruitment Team
 
 
  
 
recruitment@opglobal.com.hk
OPG Careers Page
135 Bonham Strand Trade Centre, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
 
 
 

IMPORTANT: The contents of this email and any attachments are confidential. They are intended for the named recipient(s) only. If you have received this email by mistake, please notify the sender immediately and do not disclose the contents to anyone or make copies thereof.

Jamal Al Badi

candidateEmail.subject: Let's Connect About Your Application!
candidateEmail.body:
Hi Alex,

Thank you so much for applying for the Customer Support Specialist role at Outsourced Pro Global! We're excited to learn more about you and share what makes our team a great place to grow.

We'd love to invite you for a quick 15-20 minute Zoom chat with our Recruitment Specialist. This is a great chance for us to get to know each other better and see if this role and our company are the right fit for you.

Interview details:
Date: 2026-05-18
Time: 10:00
Zoom Link: https://zoom.us/j/example-recruiter

Friendly Reminders:

Kindly connect 10 minutes early to make sure your camera and microphone are working properly.
Use your laptop or PC for this interview.
Make sure that your Full Name and the role you are interviewing for are reflected in the Zoom meeting.
Please be reminded that this is a formal meeting, so be in business attire.
If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to any of our recruiters at +61 489 275 966 (AU) or through their mobile number.

Yours in Outsourced Pro Global,
Jamal Al Badi
Recruitment Team
